bullets: AI data center expansion implies materially higher electricity consumption compared with traditional cloud loads.

takeaways: Prepare for higher peak and baseload requirements from AI customers—expect more interconnection requests and resource adequacy impacts.

Model impacts on system load profiles and capacity markets—early engagement can reduce curtailment risk and speed project delivery.
